debug_info.goal:
case hf₁
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
f2 :
  circleAverage (fun a => logCounting f (↑a) r + log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x => f x - a) 0‖) 0 1 =
    circleAverage (fun a => circleAverage (fun x => log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r) 0 1
⊢ CircleIntegrable (fun a => logCounting f (↑a) r) 0 1

failed_attempts:
apply CircleIntegrable.congr (g := fun a ↦ circleAverage (fun x ↦ log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r)
    · apply CircleIntegrable.add
      · exact ρx hr h.meromorphicOn h₂
      · exact circleIntegrable_const _ _ _
    · filter_upwards with a
      simp
      intro _
      rw [logCounting_coe_eq_logCounting_sub_const_zero,
          logCounting_zero_sub_logCounting_top_eq_circleAverage_sub_const (h.sub (Meromorphic.const _)) hr,
          logCounting_sub_const h]
      have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - circleMap 0 1 a) 0 = - circleMap 0 1 a := by
        rw [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
        apply MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt
        · apply meromorphicAt_const
        · apply h.meromorphicAt
        · simp [meromorphicOrderAt_const, circleMap_ne_zero, h₂]
      rw [this]
      simp
